help.subtitle.super: Complete guide for Super Admin — manage users, monitor system, and configure security.
help.subtitle.admin: Guide for Admin — manage reports, release emails, and monitor system activity.
help.subtitle.user: Guide for User — how to read emails, report issues, and use filtering features.
help.section1.title: 1. Email Detection & Processing Flow
help.section1.intro: Every incoming email goes through a multi-layer real-time detection pipeline. The following are the detailed stages each email passes through:
help.section1.step1.title: Receipt & Metadata Extraction
help.section1.step1.text: Email is received via IMAP connection. The system extracts sender address, domain, DKIM/SPF/DMARC headers, link list, attachments, and text content for analysis.
help.section1.step2.title: SpamAssassin Scoring
help.section1.step2.text: SpamAssassin engine provides an initial score based on heuristic rules: spam patterns, domain reputation, public blacklists, and manipulative techniques in email content.
help.section1.step3.title: Machine Learning Classification
help.section1.step3.text: XGBoost/LightGBM model analyzes textual and structural features of the email. Output is a Phishing vs Ham probability. The model is periodically updated from feedback loop data.
help.section1.step4.title: Anomaly Detection
help.section1.step4.text: Isolation Forest detects emails with abnormal structure — extreme link counts, new domains, suspicious attachment sizes. Anomaly score ranges from 0.0 (normal) to 1.0 (abnormal).
help.section1.step5.title: Fusion Engine & Final Score
help.section1.step5.text: Three scores (ML, SpamAssassin, Anomaly) are combined using adaptive weights. The Fused Score (0.0 - 1.0) determines the decision: Clean, Warning, or Quarantine.
help.section1.step6.title: Routing & Action
help.section1.step6.text: Based on Fused Score: Clean (< threshold) → inbox directly. Warning → inbox with label. Quarantine (> threshold) → held, does not reach inbox.
help.section2.title: 2. Email Security Categories
help.section2.card1.title: Inbox / Clean
help.section2.card1.text: Email declared safe by all modules. Delivered to inbox without intervention.
help.section2.card2.title: Spam
help.section2.card2.text: Email with suspicious score. Delivered to inbox with [SPAM] label. Do not click links inside.
help.section2.card3.title: Phishing
help.section2.card3.text: Strong phishing indication (lookalike domain, credential request). Email is quarantined — not delivered to inbox.
help.section2.card4.title: Warning
help.section2.card4.text: Medium-score email. Delivered to inbox with orange warning banner. Verify before clicking.
help.section2.card5.title: Quarantine
help.section2.card5.text: Dangerous email is held. Does not appear in regular user's inbox.
help.section3.title: 3. User Guide
help.section3.step1: Login: Open the login page, click "Login with Google" or enter credentials from admin.
help.section3.step2: Check Email: Clean emails are in Inbox. Spam emails come with a yellow [SPAM] label.
help.section3.step3: Filter by Category: Click categories in the sidebar (Spam, Phishing, Transaction, etc.) to filter.
help.section3.step4: Email Details: Click an email to view details. If there is a warning, read the AI score explanation.
help.section3.step5: Search Email: Use the search bar above to search by subject, sender, or content.
help.section3.step6: Report Issue: If you find a suspicious email or bug, click the Report flag icon in the top right. Select a category and submit — admin will follow up.
help.section3.step7: Metrics: Click "Metrics" in the sidebar to view daily detection statistics.
help.section3.step8: Theme: Click the moon/sun icon to toggle dark/light theme.
help.section4.title: Guide for Admin
help.section4.step1: Access Admin Panel: Click "Admin Panel" in the sidebar to open the dashboard.
help.section4.step2: Overview Tab: View summary: total emails processed, quarantine count, open reports.
help.section4.step3: Reports Tab: Manage user reports. Filter by category, view details, reply to reports, update status (open → in_progress → resolved).
help.section4.step4: Release Email: Open quarantined email details, click "Release to Inbox" if safe. Or "Confirm Phishing" to strengthen detection.
help.section4.step5: Activity Tab: View activity logs: login, logout, email release, setting changes.
help.section4.step6: Settings: Change detection threshold, sender whitelist, protected domains, IMAP configuration, and notifications.
help.section5.title: 5. Super Admin Guide
help.section5.step1: User Management: Users tab — add new user, edit role, reset password, deactivate/activate account.
help.section5.step2: Delete Email: Can permanently delete emails from the system if necessary.
help.section5.step3: All Admin Access: Super Admin has all capabilities that Admin has.
help.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
help.faq.user.q1: Q: My email did not arrive in the inbox, what should I do?
help.faq.user.a1: Contact the admin via the Report menu or internal communication channels. Admin will check the quarantine.
help.faq.user.q2: Q: I found a phishing email in my inbox, what should I do?
help.faq.user.a2: Do not click the link/attachment. Click the Report button to report it to admin.
help.faq.user.q3: Q: Why is my business partner's email being quarantined?
help.faq.user.a3: The partner's domain may not be recognized by the system yet. Contact admin to release and add to whitelist.
help.faq.user.q4: Q: How do I change my password?
help.faq.user.a4: Go to Settings → Account. If logging in via Google, use your Google account. Contact admin if you forgot your password.
help.faq.admin.q1: Q: How do I release an email from quarantine?
help.faq.admin.a1: Open email details, click "Release to Inbox". Add notes if needed. The email will be delivered to the user's inbox.
help.faq.admin.q2: Q: Can I permanently delete emails?
help.faq.admin.a2: No. Only Super Admin has permanent deletion access.
help.faq.admin.q3: Q: How long do emails stay in quarantine?
help.faq.admin.a3: According to retention settings (default 30 days). After that, they are automatically deleted.
help.faq.admin.q4: Q: What should I do if I receive a false positive report?
help.faq.admin.a4: Verify the email, release to inbox, add FP notes, and add the domain to the whitelist in Settings.
help.faq.super.q1: Q: How do I add a new user?
help.faq.super.a1: Open Admin Panel → Users tab → click "Add User". Enter username, password, and role if available.
help.faq.super.q2: Q: How do I reset a user's password?
help.faq.super.a2: Open Admin Panel → Users tab → click Edit on the user → enter new password → Save.
help.faq.super.q3: Q: How do I deactivate a user account?
help.faq.super.a3: Open Admin Panel → Users tab → click Deactivate on the target user. The user cannot login until reactivated.
help.faq.super.q4: Q: How long is the quarantine data retention period?
help.faq.super.a4: Default 30 days. Can be changed in Settings → Quarantine Retention.
help.tips.title: Security Tips
help.tips.item1: Never provide your password or OTP via email.
help.tips.item2: Check the sender's domain carefully (example: l0daya.com vs lodaya.com).
help.tips.item3: If in doubt, do not click the link. Hover over it to see the destination URL.
help.tips.item4: Report suspicious emails — this helps the system detect better.
help.tips.item5: Use two-factor authentication (2FA) for additional security.
